rationale: Flaky timing test on 32-bit Solaris; assertion value off due to platform-specific timer behavior.
Race condition in test error message content due to unpredictable getaddrinfo duration; test reliability fix.
Adding native TLS support for OpenBSD LibreSSL/libtls; platform support addition, not spec conformance.
Adding SNI support for OpenSSL; TLS feature addition, not a spec-defined behavior.
Adding SNI support for Windows Secure Channel; TLS feature addition, not a spec-defined behavior.
IPv6 certificate SAN validation bug in OpenSSL (AF_INET used instead of AF_INET6); TLS implementation bug.
Expanding SSL CI test matrix; CI/testing infrastructure improvement, no spec behavior involved.
Adding SLES zSeries build variant to Evergreen CI; build infrastructure, no driver behavior involved.
Adding ARM64 build variants to Evergreen CI; build infrastructure, no driver behavior involved.
Adding POWER8 Ubuntu build variants to Evergreen CI; build infrastructure, no driver behavior involved.
Memory leak in handshake data on topology scanner node destroy; resource management bug, no spec rule violated.
Flaky test: collection already exists due to reused timestamp-based name; test isolation bug.
libbson raises error on valid UTF-8 chars (é, ö, ü); BSON spec requires valid UTF-8 string handling.
Internal rename of 'metadata' to 'handshake' to match spec renaming; pure code cleanup, public API already updated in CDRIVER-1446.
Handling legacy error codes (59, 13390, no-error) for command-not-found; no specific spec rule named.
Tests hang or fail on 32-bit Unix platforms; platform-specific CI reliability issue, not a spec behavior bug.
Un-prefixed TRACE macro clashes with HHVM's TRACE define; C preprocessor symbol naming/build issue.
Driver not parsing writeConcernError and returning false for write commands; fix depends on SPEC-619.
Clarifying confusing thread-safety documentation with typo and grammar fixes; docs only.
Documentation for bson_iter_decimal128 and bson_decimal128_t; docs addition only.
Memory leak in bson-streaming-reader.c found by static analysis; resource management bug, no spec rule.
Secure Channel (TLS) doesn't compile on VS 2010; build/compiler compatibility issue.
libbson tests built even when --enable-tests=no is set; build system configuration bug.
Windows test failures and missing testing instructions; documentation and CI issue.
Handshake test crashes (coredump) on 32-bit Solaris in /Client/sends_metadata_single; platform-specific crash.
Invalid free (munmap_chunk: invalid pointer) when unable to connect to multiple mongos; memory corruption bug.
multiple_selection_errors test failure on zSeries; no description provided, insufficient detail.
Reducing build frequency for zSeries/POWER8 using Evergreen batchtime option; CI configuration only.
connectTimeoutMS value not honored; actual timeout can be 2ms when 100ms specified due to elapsed-time subtraction.
Uninitialized argument value in mongoc_socket_accept_ex found by static analysis; implementation bug.
Sanitizing/normalizing values in handshake metadata collection (quotes, whitespace); internal data handling.
'make install' exposes private headers; build/packaging issue, no spec behavior involved.
Mock server wire-protocol logging to file/stdout/stderr/json; test tooling improvement, not spec test runner.
Race: topology scanner removes server description before app thread locks, causing NULL dereference crash; concurrency bug.
mongoc_write_concern_destroy may free null wtag pointer; memory safety bug, not a spec rule violation.
mongoc_cursor_more() always returns true even after exhaustion; libmongoc-specific API, not a spec-defined function.
Hostnames exceeding HOST_NAME_MAX not null-terminated, causing silent failures; platform-specific C implementation bug.
Functions raise MONGOC_ERROR without returning false; internal error propagation API consistency bug.
mongoc_client_get_server_descriptions returns NULLs instead of tightly packing results; C API contract bug, SDAM spec does not define array packing.
Segfault in bson_iter_double (rax=0) during update; user-reported crash, memory corruption/use-after-free.
Tailable cursors without AWAIT_DATA marked done on empty getMore; spec at find_getmore_killcursors shows tailable without awaitData is valid.
libbson 1.4.0 compile errors when BSON_EXPERIMENTAL_FEATURES=0; preprocessor guard inconsistency, build bug.
SDAM API functions missing const on server_description_t parameter; C API const-correctness, not spec behavior.
make release-archive fails for libbson 1.4.1; build/release tooling failure.
mongoc_cursor_t filter and opts documents not freed; memory leak found by ASAN/Valgrind, no spec rule violated.
Docs should note mongoc_bulk_operation_delete is deprecated in favor of mongoc_bulk_operation_remove; docs only.
Suppress 'Falling back to malloc for counters' warning to stdout; internal warning message behavior.
libbson headers use _Decimal128 type directly, breaking C++ compilation; C++ compatibility/build issue.
New mongoc_collection_find_with_opts API addition; feature addition depending on DRIVERS-347, not a nonconformance fix.
SSL client to non-SSL mongod leaks one socket per request; resource management/TLS implementation bug.
